title: RamseyOS Dashboard Widget
description: Runtime state for a single dashboard widget instance. Captures the widget's current data snapshot for rendering. Widgets are ephemeral — they are assembled on each dashboard load from source data, not persisted long-term.

widgetId.description: Unique instance ID for this widget on the dashboard.

widgetType.description: The type of widget this represents.

title.description: Display title for the widget header.

status.description: Current data status of the widget.

badge.description: Optional count badge (e.g., 3 approvals pending, 12 tasks today).

data.description: Widget-type-specific data payload. Structure varies by widgetType.

emptyMessage.description: Message to display when the widget has no data (e.g., 'No approvals pending').

actionLabel.description: Label for the primary action button (e.g., 'View All', 'Add Reflection').

actionTarget.description: URL or route for the primary action (e.g., '/approvals', '/tasks').

lastRefreshed.description: When this widget's data was last fetched.
